action.reasoning: Observation: PI0 loads+processors OK but success_rate=0.0 across tasks; test_obs.py reveals runtime obs has rgb=(4,480,480,3) uint8 (4 cams), ee_state=(8,), instruction=str, last_action=(6,). Current predict.py repeats same image for all PI0 views, incomplete main(), naive action bridge without proper current ee_state delta. Analysis: Image prep (PIL resize to 224x224 per-view mapping 0->base_0_rgb,1->left_wrist,2->right_wrist), recursive device move, post-preprocess action_chunk, and ee delta bridge (pos=current_pos+action[:3]*0.05, euler=action[3:6]*scale, grip=clip(action[6])) are needed per guidance+test_obs. RecordingEvaluator subclass collects exact per-episode JSON while replicating base evaluate_single_episode contract (handles track_path json load, max_episode_length). This keeps Pi0 track (no from-scratch). Decision: Overwrite predict.py with fixes (no train.py change yet), add syntax check + short test_obs update for local validation before full eval submission. Expect non-zero success if views+bridge improve IK/execution; measure time then add LoRA/finetune in future iters.
